title: Workflow Orchestration
trigger: Any new mission that needs routing and dependency planning.

title: Website Rebuild Workflow
trigger: A website needs redesign, re-platforming, or major structural improvement.

title: SEO Growth Workflow
trigger: A site needs rankings, snippets, internal links, trust, or technical SEO improvements.

title: Content Publishing Workflow
trigger: A content program or article batch needs planning, drafting, review, and publishing readiness.

title: AdSense Readiness Workflow
trigger: A property needs policy-safe monetization readiness evaluation.

title: Lead Research Workflow
trigger: The marketing team needs qualified leads and audit-ready outreach opportunities.

title: Human Approved Outreach Workflow
trigger: A campaign needs draft outreach and approval-gated follow-up plans.

title: Client Project Delivery Workflow
trigger: A client engagement needs end-to-end discovery through delivery preparation.

title: Analytics Review Workflow
trigger: A business needs KPI review, reporting, and next-step recommendations.

title: Weekly Agency Operations Workflow
trigger: The company needs a recurring operating review across delivery, growth, and risk.

title: Controlled Browser Workflow
trigger: A task needs browser observation with login, 2FA, or human-gated external steps.

title: Documentation Update Workflow
trigger: A mission or task changed system state and requires durable records.

title: QA And Release Workflow
trigger: A build or deliverable needs validation and release readiness review.
